Default action is 'permit': all traffic matching no rule is allowed (permit-any).

### ❌ `FW-PERMIT-SCOPE` [HIGH] — Permit rules are narrowed (by zone or address) on both sides

### ❌ `FW-ZONE-IFACE-UNIQUE` [HIGH] — Each interface is bound to exactly one zone
